claim: Sub-agents solve context rot by isolating research/analysis tasks; use cheaper, faster models for sub-agents while keeping main agent focused
actionable: Delegate code analysis and web research to sub-agents; keep main agent context clean by only including synthesized results, not raw research
source_title: The Subagent Era Is Officially Here - Learn this Now

claim: Sub-agents are only effective for research, not implementation; avoid parallel implementation sub-agents as they create hallucinations and conflicts
actionable: Reserve sub-agents for analysis/planning phases; keep implementation in main agent where it can validate all changed files together
source_title: The Subagent Era Is Officially Here - Learn this Now

claim: GPT-5.4 Mini/Nano (188 tps, 1/5 cost of Haiku) and similar efficient models unlock unlimited sub-agent budgets for token-heavy research tasks
actionable: Switch to GPT-5.4 Nano for sub-agents in coding workflows; cost/throughput improvement lets you run hundreds of thousands of research tokens cheaply
source_title: The Subagent Era Is Officially Here - Learn this Now

claim: All major coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI) now have built-in sub-agents; use these out-of-box without custom definitions
actionable: Explore built-in sub-agent features in your coding agent (Codex/Claude Code/Cursor) for research before building custom sub-agents
source_title: The Subagent Era Is Officially Here - Learn this Now
